properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Once more my soul the Saviour through the world Is offered full and free And now Oh Lord I must, I must decide, Shall I accept of Thee.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Iwill, l will, I will God helping me I will Oh Lord be Thine Thy precious blood was shed to purchase me I will be wholly Thine.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: By grace I will Thy mercy now receive Thy love my heart has won On Thee Oh Christ I will, I will believe And trust in Thee alone.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Thou knowest Lord, how very weak I am And how I fear to stray, For strength to serve I look to Thee alone, The strength Thou must supply.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And now Oh Lord give all with us to stay Thy grace to join our song, And from the heart to gladly with us stay I will to Christ belong.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: To all who came when Thou was here below, And said, Oh Lord will Thou? To them I will, was ever your reply We rest upon it now.
